title: Uruguayan Lasagne
description: A twist on the classic Italian dish, this Uruguayan lasagne combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with the heartiness of pasta. Enjoy as a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, parsley, and garlic. Season with salt to taste.
Spoon a layer of mediterranean sauce into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagne noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta mixture over the noodles.
Sprinkle with half of the mozzarella cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the sauce, the ricotta mixture, and finally the remaining mozzarella cheese.
Top with grated parmesan cheese (if using).
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the lasagne rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
